query: Find 10 parcels in Drammen municipality larger than 5000 m² that intersect 200-year flood zones, sorted by parcel area descending.

1.description: resolve Drammen municipality geometry for spatial filtering

2.description: get 200-year flood zones for spatial intersection

3.description: reduce flood zones to only those intersecting Drammen municipality

4.description: get parcels in Drammen municipality larger than 5000 m²

5.description: find parcels intersecting the reduced 200-year flood zones

6.description: ensure one row per parcel by keeping the largest area if duplicates exist
